# Train With Purpose.     Play With Confidence.

[FOLLOW ME](https://www.instagram.com/lexiepro_tennis/reels/)

## ONLINE COACHING PROGRAMS

These programs are designed for players at every stage — from beginners building fundamentals to competitive athletes refining performance.

Choose the level of coaching that fits your goals.

From a one-time technical breakdown to full structured development — your progress starts here.

![Screen Shot 2026-02-21 at 9.50.27 PM.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/487303_7343b5ddc8bf424cb315e3b6ac0bcedd~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_0,y_0,w_868,h_868/fill/w_174,h_174,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Screen%20Shot%202026-02-21%20at%209_50_27%20PM.png)

### One-Time Video   Analysis     $75

• One technical breakdown (up to 10 minutes of footage)

• Stroke mechanics + contact point analysis

• Footwork positioning review

• Clear technical corrections

• Drills tailored to your specific issue

• Action steps you can apply immediately

​

​

Best for:

Players who feel stuck, unsure about their mechanics, or want professional feedback before taking the next step.

![Screen Shot 2026-02-21 at 10.00.37 PM.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/487303_c5acf220cfec4090ac10ab37edc43976~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_0,y_1,w_1021,h_1021/fill/w_159,h_159,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Screen%20Shot%202026-02-21%20at%2010_00_37%20PM.png)

### 4-Week Performance Program     $197

Describe your service here. What makes it great? Use short catchy text to tell people what you offer, and the benefits they will receive. A great description gets readers in the mood, and makes them more likely to go ahead and book.

​

​

​​

​

Best for:

Players who want structured improvement, weekly feedback, and accountability to build real progress over 4 weeks.

![Screen Shot 2026-02-21 at 9.58.15 PM.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/487303_e32ff52b97bd47bbb1d35f6a0c91e748~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_11,y_0,w_977,h_977/fill/w_167,h_167,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Screen%20Shot%202026-02-21%20at%209_58_15%20PM.png)

## Competitive Edge Mentorship

## ​

## $397

​

Describe your service here. What makes it great? Use short catchy text to tell people what you offer, and the benefits they will receive. A great description gets readers in the mood, and makes them more likely to go ahead and book.

​

​

​

​

Best for:

Players who compete, care about results, and want a coach involved in their development — not just reviewing videos.

Train Smarter. Play Stronger. Win More .

Private & online tennis coaching

[BOOK A LESSON](https://calendly.com/tennissanjose?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAZXh0bgNhZW0CMTEAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQMMjU2MjgxMDQwNTU4AAGn-8png3gXIdDiPQAxgOlML80LxDVBdZpYPKqBLLQux1kvG9nsD09iQTmE2Tg_aem_ddTRSj1nC7pUI2hevHmRjA&brid=aRQ8Qpj-ZUc764CEE4Kz4g)

## PRIVATE & GROUP TENNIS SESSIONS

### ​

I offer private 1-on-1 sessions and small group training focused on technical improvement, match play, and building confidence on court. Every session is tailored — no random feeding, no generic drills.

Private Sessions

- Personalized technical and tactical coaching

- Ideal for focused improvement and fast progress

- All levels: juniors & adults


Group Sessions

- Small groups (level-based)

- High-intensity drills + live point play

- Competitive, motivating training environment


Locations

- 📍 Los Angeles

- 📍 Bay Area


📩 To book a session or ask about availability:

lexieprocollab@gmail.com

### ONLINE TENNIS COACHING

Train with a professional coach — no matter where you are.

My online coaching is built around personalized video analysis, clear technical breakdowns, and drills tailored to yourlevel, goals, and playing style. You send in your practice or match footage, and I break it down step-by-step so you know what to fix, why it matters, and how to train it correctly.

You’ll receive:

- In-depth video analysis with voiceover feedback

- Clear, actionable corrections (not generic tips)

- Customized drills you can apply immediately

- Technical, tactical, and movement guidance

- Ongoing communication and progress tracking


This is ideal for players who want real improvement, structured guidance, and professional feedback — without being limited by location or schedule.

Available for:

- Junior & adult players

- Competitive and recreational levels

- Remote coaching worldwide

- Content collaborations & brand partnerships


GET A FREE GUIDE

" PERFECT TENNIS RACKET"

[DOWNLOAD GUIDE](https://www.lexieprotennis.com/_files/ugd/487303_b115bbca605e4733b2bc48274c6ff9f4.pdf)

![IMG_3456.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/487303_e27537f5a23441bf996574401608d305~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_117,h_200,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/487303_e27537f5a23441bf996574401608d305~mv2.jpg)

![](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/487303_b8f2504df35e42c08d7d6741c453d93af000.jpg/v1/fill/w_113,h_200,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,blur_2,enc_avif,quality_auto/487303_b8f2504df35e42c08d7d6741c453d93af000.jpg)

## ABOUT ME

I’m a professional tennis coach with a competitive background and a results-driven approach to training.

My coaching focuses on clear technique, smart decision-making, and building confident, independent players. I don’t overload you with information — I simplify the game so you understand what to do, why you’re doing it, and how to execute under pressure.

I work with juniors and adults at different levels, combining technical training, movement, and match awareness to help players improve efficiently — on and off the court.

Whether you train with me online or in person, my goal is the same:

real progress, not random drills.

[lxpro.tennis](https://www.lexieprotennis.com/)

For coaching, collaborations & partnerships:

[lexieprocollab@gmail.com](mailto:lexieprocollab@gmail.com)

SF\|LA
